NOTES   (see introductory pages for explanation of train operator codes and standard symbols)
a
Arrival time
d
Departure time
A
Runs until 27 September
B
Runs from 4 October
C
Also calls at Heaton Chapel 1421 and Levenshulme 1425
D
Also calls at Heaton Chapel 2026 and Levenshulme 2029
